name: settings-inquiry
description: User asks for current setting state -- agent should consult inspect_self instead of inventing a value

messages.text: Ist Auto-Extract gerade an oder aus?
Lass mich das nachschauen statt zu raten -- inspect_self mit area=settings gibt die Wahrheit. Auto-Extract ist an, Threshold steht auf 6 Messages.

extractorOutput.session_summary: Sebastian asked for the current Auto-Extract state; Obsilo looked it up via inspect_self instead of guessing.
extractorOutput.conversation_so_far: User informed about current Auto-Extract setting.
